output.explanation: Pattern inconsistency: most values use 12.0, 16.0, 19.2, or 24.0 oz; 32.0 oz. appears with very low frequency (count=3) but not enough support to treat it as valid within this list’s prevalent domain.
Pattern/domain inconsistency: 32.0 OZ. is extremely rare in this list (count=1) compared with the dominant sizes; adjust to the prevalent size format.

Syntactic/unit pattern mismatch: all other numeric weights use one decimal with whole-number ounces (e.g., 12.0, 16.0, 24.0) or 19.2; 8.4 ounce deviates from the main established numeric set and is not supported by other entries.
Pattern/domain inconsistency: 19.2 oz. Alumi-Tek appears only once (count=1) while other Alumi-Tek variants are mostly for 12/16/24/32 in this list; choose the closest prevalent Alumi-Tek size.
Pattern inconsistency: 32.0 oz. is extremely low support (count=3) relative to the dominant sizes; align with the more common size set.

Pattern inconsistency: 19.2 oz (count=4) is supported, but capitalization/punctuation variant differs from the more common form (most 19.2 entries include either 'oz.' or 'OZ.'); normalize to the most frequent punctuation.
Syntactic/unit pattern mismatch: 16.9 OZ. deviates from the established numeric set (12.0, 16.0, 19.2, 24.0, 32.0) and is very rare (count=1).
